data.title: Relocate check-plugin-boundary.sh and allowlist to .claude/hooks/pre-commit/ and update all references
data.description:
testing_mode: UPDATE

Atomically relocate both files and update all consumers in one commit (cannot split without breaking tests mid-relocation).

Steps:
1. Create .claude/hooks/pre-commit/ directory
2. git mv plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh
3. git mv plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf .claude/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf
4. Update .pre-commit-config.yaml: change entry path from 'plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh' to '.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh'
5. Update tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh: change HOOK and ALLOWLIST variables from $DSO_PLUGIN_DIR/hooks/pre-commit/ to $REPO_ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/
6. Update tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh: update any PLAYWRIGHT_DEBUG_SKILL or HOOK path references that use the old location
7. Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh passes at new location

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh
- [ ] .claude/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf
- [ ] plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/ directory no longer contains check-plugin-boundary.sh or plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf
  Verify: test ! -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh
- [ ] .pre-commit-config.yaml entry references .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh
  Verify: grep -q '.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.pre-commit-config.yaml
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh
- [ ] Staging a file at plugins/dso/docs/findings/test.md triggers hook to exit non-zero
  Verify: run test-check-plugin-boundary.sh assertion for prohibited path
